flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Kansas Wesleyan University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $34.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Kansas Wesleyan University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($31.3k → $34.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kansas Wesleyan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kansas Wesleyan University rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (758 → 956).
